implementation_prerequisite.detail: TAS-174 builds on TAS-173, so the canonical trained Transformer-backed article route must already own the selected HullCache path before exactness and no-fallback closure can turn green

hull_cache_closure_review.detail: the widened HullCache closure report must now show LongLoopKernel, SudokuClass, and HungarianMatching as exact with zero fallback cases before TAS-174 can close

report.claim_boundary: this report closes only TAS-174. It proves the selected HullCache fast path is now exact and no-fallback on the declared canonical article workload families inside the current article profile, and that the served article-session plus hybrid route surfaces expose those workloads as direct HullCache executions on the trained Transformer-backed model. It does not yet claim throughput-floor closure or final article-equivalence green status.
report.summary: Article fast-route exactness report now records tied_requirement_satisfied=true, implementation_prerequisite_green=true, all_article_workloads_exact=true, article_session_direct_cases=3, hybrid_direct_cases=3, exactness_green=true, and article_equivalence_green=false.

claim_boundary: this summary mirrors only the TAS-174 fast-route exactness tranche. It keeps the zero-fallback article-workload closure operator-readable without pretending that TAS-175 throughput closure or final article-equivalence green status are already closed.
summary: Article fast-route exactness summary now records tied_requirement_satisfied=true, implementation_prerequisite_green=true, all_article_workloads_exact=true, article_session_direct_case_count=3, hybrid_direct_case_count=3, exactness_green=true, and article_equivalence_green=false.
